title: sibbaldia parviflora var. micrantha
intro: Sibbaldia parviflora var. micrantha, also known as a plant species, is a type of alpine plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sibbaldia parviflora var. micrantha include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving digestion and relieving fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or infusions, where the leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
